hero_subtitle: Genfy is the complete AI video platform for creators, sellers, and digital businesses. Upload a product image, choose your AI engine, and get a ready-to-post video with captions and hashtags — instantly.
howItWorks_title: From Image to Video in 3 Steps
howItWorks_subtitle: No editing skills required. Just upload, generate, and post.
howItWorks_step1_desc: Upload a product photo or paste a TikTok Shop link — Genfy auto-fills product details.
howItWorks_step2_desc: Choose your AI engine and let Genfy create a professional video with AI-generated captions.
howItWorks_step3_desc: Download your video and captions. Post directly to TikTok, Instagram, or any platform.
features_title: Everything You Need to Scale Video
features_subtitle: A complete workflow for AI video creation — from product to post.
feature_imageToVideo_desc: Upload any product image and get a professional marketing video in seconds. Supports up to 4 images per batch.
feature_aiPowered_desc: GPT-powered prompt generation tailored to your product. The AI writes the perfect video brief automatically.
feature_multiEngine_desc: Choose Genfy Engine, Ultra (Sora 2), Prime (VEO 3.1), or Advanced — each tuned for different quality, speed, and style needs.
feature_tiktokShop_desc: Paste a TikTok Shop product link and Genfy auto-extracts the name, price, and image to pre-fill your video.
feature_captions_desc: Every video comes with AI-generated captions and hashtag sets optimized for your target platform and language.
feature_gallery_desc: All your generated videos in one place. Filter by status, download, or re-use at any time.
feature_noWatermark_desc: Clean, watermark-free output at every quality tier — ready to publish professionally.
feature_multiLang_desc: Generate prompts and captions in any language. Optimized for Portuguese and English markets.
models_subtitle: Four purpose-built engines. Pick the right one for your quality, speed, and budget needs.
model_engine_desc: Fast and reliable. Ideal for high-volume product videos, batch creation, and quick social content.
model_ultra_desc: Powered by OpenAI's Sora 2 model. Cinematic motion with excellent product showcasing and smooth transitions.
model_prime_desc: Google VEO 3.1 via Vidgo. The highest visual quality engine — ideal for premium campaigns and hero content.
model_advanced_desc: VEO 3 Fast via Kie.ai. The best balance of quality and speed for demanding creators who need both.
platform_subtitle: Genfy Studio is a complete ecosystem. Every tool you need to create, manage, and distribute video content at scale.
platform_studio_desc: The creation workspace. Upload products, choose your AI engine, write prompts, and generate videos with a single click.
platform_gallery_desc: Your video library. View all generated content, filter by status, download, and manage your entire video history.
platform_hub_desc: Your strategy dashboard. Discover trending products, validate items before creating, and view your token balance and stats.
platform_marketplace_desc: Buy and sell TikTok Shop accounts. Browse listings, negotiate deals, and complete transactions with in-platform chat.
platform_community_desc: Share your best videos, explore what others are creating, and discover new product ideas from the Genfy creator community.
platform_social_desc: Distribute your content directly. Connect TikTok accounts and post your videos without leaving the platform.
users_subtitle: Whether you sell products, manage brands, or produce content — Genfy fits your workflow.
user_creator_desc: Generate more content in less time. Fill your content calendar with professional product videos without any editing experience.
user_seller_desc: Turn your product catalog into video ads automatically. Validate trending products and create scroll-stopping content for TikTok Shop.
user_manager_desc: Manage video production for multiple brands and clients from one platform. Scale output without scaling your team.
user_marketer_desc: A/B test different AI engines and styles for your products. Get high-quality video assets for paid and organic campaigns.
user_business_desc: From 10 videos to 10,000. The Business tier scales with your production needs — with API access and priority support.
pricing_subtitle: Buy tokens once, use them whenever you need. No subscriptions, no monthly resets — tokens never expire.
pricing_token_explain_desc: Each video generation costs between 100–200 tokens depending on the AI engine you choose. Tokens are purchased as packages and deducted when you generate.
sim_subtitle: See how many videos you can create with your tokens
updates_subtitle: Automatically generated from our latest development activity
cta_subtitle: Join creators, sellers, and businesses using Genfy to produce professional AI videos at scale.
footer_tagline: The complete AI video ecosystem for creators, sellers, and digital businesses.
